name: The Third Tranquility of the Storm

system.description:
Discipline: Qinggong
Skill: Speed against Evade
Type: Normal
Qi: 5

In order to use this Technique, it must be raining and you must have a fan (it can be bamboo or metal). You use raindrops as though they were solid, flicking your fan and sending them flying at an opponent. To hit the rain properly, make a Speed roll against Evade. This allows you to direct enough sharp, solid raindrops to inflict one target with 1d10 Damage per Qi level. Cathartic: You may add one additional target per Rank of Qinggong. Damage to each target increases to 1d10 per Qi Level plus 2 Extra Wounds.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
